chapter.label: Tale 59
chapter.title: The life of abba thalilaios the cilician D

paragraphs.text: me so? The youth said: “Your eyes. It is your eyes which have Abba Peter, priest of the same lavra, told us that Abba Thalilaios seduced me.’ When the anchoress heard this, that her eyes had led the Cilician spent sixty years in the monastic life and never once the youth astray, she picked up her shuttle and picreed and cast out stopped weeping. He would always say: ‘God gave us this time for both her eyes <with it>. When the youth realised that it was repentance; it is indeed for Him that we must seek’. because of him that she had put out her two cyes, he was so filled with remorse that he went away to Scéié and distinguished himself
